film.title: Beauty and the Beast
film.overview: A live-action adaptation of Disney's version of the classic tale of a cursed prince and a beautiful young woman who helps him break the spell.

dialogues.dialogue: You can't talk to us like that. I forbid it.  Oh. Am I too late?  Shame, I was really going to tell him off this time.  Oh, Master, you've returned.  - Oh, very funny. - I got you there.
Finally... a woman.  a woman.  Pretty eyes.  Proud face.  Perfect canvas. Yes!  I will find you something worthy of a princess.  Oh, I'm not a princess.
There you are, dear.  Ma chčre mademoiselle.  It is with deepest pride  and greatest pleasure... that we welcome you tonight.  that we welcome you tonight.
Here! And now... we invite you to relax.  we invite you to relax.  Let us pull up a chair... as the dining room proudly presents... Your dinner!  Your dinner!  Be our guest, be our guest
